mentions.note: #8 January performer, up ~28%. Agricultural middleman. Trading 13x earnings; cheap if ag recovery comes 2026. Reports Wednesday—wait for guidance before deciding; Cramer less close to this one now.
Caller Johnny: long-term core holding with unique US/South America presence; hold, don't buy more. Agribusiness side doing better due to Middle East disruption.
Doing well in Johnny's portfolio; agricultural exposure valuable; part of diversified mix with copper, tech, retail, regional bank.
